title: Simply Shader
description: This modpack adds several shaders, so everyone can easily find the right shader for themselves.
body:
This modpack is designed to allow users to **easily** download and then **simply** choose from and use a **variety of shaders**. There are a large number of shaders available; everyone should be able to find something that suits them. It's a **simple plug-and-play shader** modpack; just install the modpack, choose a shader and you're done. You can join a standard vanilla server, and **gameplay-wise, nothing changes**; only the **graphics** are different.

From shaders that require good PCs to shaders that run on the worst laptops, everything is included.



_Contains the resourcepacks licensed under CC BY 4.0.:_
- _Inventory question mark_
- _Letter to Morse code translation_
- _Tom's New Painting Textures_
